meta.title: Story | AmberNord
meta.description: From the false kick to real clarity. Learn about founder Eriks Matisons and the vision behind AmberNord's uncompromising sea buckthorn essence.

og.title: Story | AmberNord
og.description: From the false kick to real clarity. Learn about founder Eriks Matisons and the vision behind AmberNord's uncompromising sea buckthorn essence.

header.h1:
From the false kick
to real clarity.

story.p1: My daily life in logistics is shaped by pace, responsibility and constant pressure. Decisions must be made in seconds; breaks barely exist. I tried to live mindfully – yet in moments of stress I kept reaching for artificial energy drinks and diet sodas. It helped in the moment, but the bad conscience remained. I knew what these synthetic substances were doing to my body.
story.p2: At some point, I had had enough. I wanted real energy. When I came across the highly concentrated essence of nordic organic sea buckthorn, I expected just «another healthy juice». But the impression was radically different: no rush, no jitters – instead a deep, natural freshness.
story.quoteHeading: Why I drink AmberNord every day
story.quoteText: «A friend brought me six bottles of this product for Christmas 2024 — to be honest, I first put them on a shelf and forgot about them. Only months later did I try it. First, the taste: at the recommended mixing ratio of about 1:10, you get a very balanced blend of concentrate and water — a pleasant acidity, unmistakably tart and refreshing. I drink a 300 ml glass in one go and immediately want another. By now I drink it every day, several times: 5–10 ml are enough to turn a glass of water into a proper drink. I used to drink too little because plain water often felt too boring — that has not been an issue since. The product convinced me so completely that AmberNord grew out of it. Single-variety, organic, every batch lab-tested, the origin fully traceable. AmberNord stands in a class of its own: an uncompromising super-concentrate, exactly what I had always been searching for.»
story.b2bNote: AmberNord also works with clinics, practices and hotels — on request.

timeline.heading: The Anatomy of Perfection
timeline.desc: A synergy of historic legends, exclusive natural power and Swiss precision.

item1.title: The royal class of berries
item1.text: «Amber» stands for the glow of the North. For our essence we use exclusively our «Zelt Selection». This specific noble variety is distinguished by an exceptionally high natural oil content that you will not find in standard products. This wild, uncompromisingly pure power is what we bring directly into your daily life.

item2.title: The ultimate longevity apothecary
item2.text: Did you know our nordic berry contains 18 of 22 known amino acids? With over 190 biologically active compounds, 9 times more Vitamin C than citrus fruit and all four Omega fatty acids in a single plant, AmberNord is an unparalleled cellular powerhouse. The absolute differentiator, however, is the extremely rare Omega-7 fatty acid, which reaches a record concentration of up to 42 % in our fruit-pulp oil.

item3.title: Swiss precision & the next level
item3.text: 100% organic, cold-pressed and from a fully sustainable zero-waste production. From our base in Aargau we guarantee uncompromising reliability. But our vision goes further: behind closed doors we are currently developing a strictly confidential project – a groundbreaking, 100% natural base essence. We cannot reveal much yet, but as soon as this superfood upgrade complements our portfolio, in synergy with the elixir it will activate the bioactive substances even more dramatically and raise them to a completely new level of bioavailability.
